Night Swim (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,494,740Details
International Box Office $22,290,647
Worldwide Box Office $54,785,387
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $230,681
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $281,177
Total $511,858
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Ray Waller is a former major league baseball player forced into early retirement by a degenerative illness, who moves into a new home with his concerned wife Eve, teenage daughter Izzy and young son Elliot. Secretly hoping, against the odds, to return to pro ball, Ray persuades Eve that the new home’s shimmering backyard swimming pool will be fun for the kids and provide physical therapy for him. But a dark secret in the home’s past will unleash a malevolent force that will drag the family under, into the depths of inescapable terror.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,797,155 (36.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.75 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:59.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,250 opening theaters/3,257 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $34,362,252

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 5th, 2024 (Wide) by Universal

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Ray Waller is a former major league baseball player forced into early retirement by a degenerative illness, who moves into a new home with his concerned wife Eve, teenage daughter Izzy and young son Elliot. Secretly hoping, against the odds, to return to pro ball, Ray persuades Eve that the new home’s shimmering backyard swimming pool will be fun for the kids and provide physical therapy for him. But a dark secret in the home’s past will unleash a malevolent force that will drag the family under, into the depths of inescapable terror.
